leagueBriefing: The Europa League Round of 16 kicked off with a night of dramatic away performances and tactical masterclasses. Aston Villa and Porto secured vital road wins to seize control of their ties, while 10-man Celta Vigo was moments away from a famous victory before Endrick rescued a draw for Lyon. Elsewhere, Nottingham Forest was left stunned by Midtjylland as the Premier League side’s European ambitions took a major hit at the City Ground.

games.headline: Pellegrini equalizer leaves Bologna and Roma deadlock in all-Italian clash
games.brief: In a cagey tactical battle between two Serie A rivals, neither side could find the decisive edge to take to the capital next week. Federico Bernardeschi gave the hosts a deserved lead with a brilliant second-half strike, but Roma captain Lorenzo Pellegrini capitalized on a rare defensive lapse to ensure the Giallorossi return home on level terms. It was a match of fine margins, highlighted by a frantic final minute that saw both sides rattle the woodwork.
bullets: Federico Bernardeschi opened the scoring in the 50th minute with a curling angled drive that beat Mile Svilar.
Lorenzo Pellegrini equalized for Roma in the 71st minute, calmly finishing from 10 yards after a through ball from Malen.
Bologna extended their unbeaten run in the Europa League to 10 consecutive matches.
A late flurry saw Roma hit the post through a Jhon Lucumí deflection, while Bologna's Lykogiannis headed against the crossbar in the 90th minute.
The draw keeps Bologna unbeaten in their last five home meetings against Roma across all competitions.
games.context: The tie remains perfectly poised ahead of the second leg at the Stadio Olimpico on March 19th.

highlights.title: Bologna vs. AS Roma: Extended Highlights | UEL Round of 16 - Leg 1

games.headline: Watkins breaks drought as Villa snatch clinical away win in France
games.brief: Unai Emery’s European pedigree was on full display as Aston Villa produced a disciplined performance to frustrate Lille at the Stade Pierre-Mauroy. The headline belonged to Ollie Watkins, who silenced his critics by ending a recent goal drought with a clinical second-half strike. Villa's backline, anchored by a focused Emiliano Martínez, withstood late pressure to secure a clean sheet and a significant advantage heading back to Birmingham.
bullets: Ollie Watkins scored the game's only goal in the 61st minute, his first strike in several matches.
Emiliano Martínez was instrumental in goal, receiving a yellow card in the 88th minute for time-masting as he preserved the shutout.
Lille failed to find the net at home despite dominating long stretches of play and forcing several saves.
The victory marks a successful return to continental knockout football for Villa as they aim for their first major European trophy in decades.
Unai Emery continues his remarkable individual record in the Europa League knockout stages.
games.context: Villa carries a crucial away goal and a lead back to Villa Park for the return leg.

highlights.title: Lille vs. Aston Villa: Extended Highlights | UEL Round of 16 - Leg 1 | CBS Sports

games.headline: Late Taborda strike sends 10-man Panathinaikos past superior Betis
games.brief: In a match that defied the run of play, Panathinaikos pulled off a heist in Athens against a Real Betis side that looked superior for most of the night. Despite playing with 10 men for over half an hour following Anass Zaroury’s red card, the Greek giants found a late hero in Vicente Taborda. Betis will be kicking themselves after failing to capitalize on their numerical advantage and a flurry of bookings that saw them lose Diego Llorente to a late red card of their own.
bullets: Vicente Taborda scored the dramatic winning goal in the 88th minute to send the Athens Olympic Stadium into a frenzy.
Anass Zaroury was sent off for the hosts in the 59th minute after receiving two yellow cards in quick succession.
Real Betis defender Diego Llorente was also sent off late in the 87th minute, just before the winning goal.
Betis goalkeeper Pau López was booked during the heated final minutes of the match.
The win gives Panathinaikos a slender but vital lead to defend in Seville next week.
games.context: Panathinaikos overcomes a massive disadvantage to keep their dream of a deep European run alive.

highlights.title: Panathinaikos vs. Real Betis: Extended Highlights | UEL Round of 16 - Leg 1 | CBS Sports Golazo

games.headline: Porto's clinical first half floors Stuttgart in Germany
games.brief: FC Porto took a giant leap toward the quarterfinals with a professional performance at the MHP Arena. Two goals in the first 30 minutes stunned the home crowd and put Stuttgart on the back foot immediately. While Deniz Undav managed to pull one back before halftime to give the Bundesliga side hope, Porto's experienced defense and goalkeeper Diogo Costa held firm during a frantic second-half barrage to secure a massive away win.
bullets: Terem Moffi opened the scoring for Porto in the 21st minute with a clinical finish.
Rodrigo Mora doubled the visitors' lead just six minutes later in the 27th minute.
Deniz Undav scored for Stuttgart in the 40th minute to keep the tie alive.
Stuttgart's Bilal El Khannouss saw a potential equalizer saved in the 88th minute by Diogo Costa.
Porto's Gabri Veiga nearly added a third in stoppage time but was denied by Alexander Nübel.
games.context: Porto returns to Portugal with two away goals and the lead, putting them in the driver's seat for the second leg.

highlights.title: Stuttgart vs. Porto: Extended Highlights | UEL Round of 16 - Leg 1 | CBS Sports Golazo

games.headline: Midtjylland haunt Forest again with shock win at the City Ground
games.brief: Nottingham Forest’s European campaign hit a major roadblock as they suffered a demoralizing home defeat to Danish side Midtjylland. In a match played in treacherous weather, Forest dominated possession and chances but lacked the clinical edge needed at this level. Cho Gue-sung’s late goal punished the Premier League side, who must now win away in Denmark to avoid being knocked out by Midtjylland for the second time this season.
bullets: Cho Gue-sung scored the only goal of the game in the 80th minute, continuing his fine form in European competition.
Forest winger Omari Hutchinson saw a 30-yard effort spectacularly saved by Elias Rafn Olafsson.
Midtjylland have now won 12 of their last 14 matches in European competitions.
This was the second time this season Midtjylland have defeated Forest, following their 3-2 group stage win.
The result leaves Forest needing their first away win in Europe this season in the second leg to stay alive.
games.context: The loss piles pressure on Forest, who are also fighting for survival in the Premier League.

highlights.title: Nottingham Forest vs. Midtjylland: Extended Highlights | UEL Round of 16 - Leg 1 | CBS Sports Golazo

games.headline: El Ouahdi strike gives Genk slender edge over frustrated Freiburg
games.brief: Genk made their home advantage count at the Cegeka Arena, securing a narrow 1-0 win in a match defined by VAR drama and defensive resilience. Zakaria El Ouahdi provided the breakthrough early in the first half, and despite Freiburg’s frantic attempts to equalize—including hitting the woodwork—the Belgian side held firm. Freiburg will head back to Germany feeling aggrieved after having a goal disallowed for offside in a match they arguably deserved more from.
bullets: Zakaria El Ouahdi scored the winning goal in the 24th minute before being booked later in the second half.
Freiburg had an early goal disallowed for offside following a VAR review.
A second VAR check denied Genk a potential penalty in a busy night for the officiating crew.
Freiburg has now failed to score within 90 minutes in each of their last five European away games.
Genk is competing in the Europa League Round of 16 for the first time since 2017.
games.context: The tie is far from over as the teams head to the Europa-Park Stadion with only a single goal separating them.

highlights.title: Genk vs. Freiburg: Extended Highlights | UEL Round of 16 - Leg 1 | CBS Sports Golazo

games.headline: Ferencváros punish Braga to take command of Round of 16 tie
games.brief: Ferencváros delivered a clinical performance in Budapest to put Sporting Braga on the brink of elimination. Goals in each half from Kanichowsky and Lenny Joseph rewarded the home side's efficiency in front of goal. Braga struggled to find a way past David Grof, who produced several key saves to keep a clean sheet and ensure the Hungarian side takes a significant two-goal lead to Portugal for the second leg.
bullets: Gavriel Kanichowsky opened the scoring in the 32nd minute with a powerful strike into the left corner.
Lenny Joseph doubled the lead in the 69th minute, smashing a high shot into the net to secure the victory.
Goalkeeper David Grof made crucial saves to deny Braga's Ricardo Horta and Rodrigo Zalazar.
Braga’s Gabriel Moscardo and Bright Arrey-Mbi were both booked as the visitors grew frustrated.
Ferencváros dominated the attacking phases, recording multiple chances through Zachariassen and Makreckis.
games.context: Ferencváros is now favorites to reach the quarterfinals after keeping a crucial clean sheet at home.

highlights.title: Ferencváros vs. Sporting Braga: Extended Highlights | UEL Round of 16 - Leg 1

games.headline: Endrick rescues Lyon after 10-man Celta Vigo nearly pulls off upset
games.brief: Celta Vigo were minutes away from a heroic victory at the Balaídos until Real Madrid loanee Endrick broke their hearts. Despite playing with a man down for most of the second half after Borja Iglesias was sent off, Celta defended their lead with incredible grit. Lyon’s persistence finally paid off in the 87th minute, sparing the French giants from a damaging defeat and shifting the momentum ahead of the return leg in France.
bullets: Javi Rueda gave Celta Vigo the lead in the 25th minute with a well-taken goal.
Borja Iglesias was sent off in the 54th minute after receiving his second yellow card.
19-year-old superstar Endrick scored the equalizer in the 87th minute to rescue a draw for Lyon.
Lyon dominated possession (60%+) following the red card but struggled to break down Celta’s low block.
The match was high-intensity throughout, resulting in six yellow cards and one red across both teams.
games.context: Lyon’s away goal gives them a slight advantage despite the underwhelming performance in Spain.

highlights.title: Celta vs. Lyon: Extended Highlights | UEL Round of 16 - Leg 1 | CBS Sports Golazo
